notes.title: Safer Build-slot optimisation
notes.summary: Added a sell priority that frees Build slots without sacrificing droids still needed for the selected Super Rebirth Goal.
changes: Added No further use, lowest earnings as a third Keep Build slots open sell priority.
This priority only sells droids with no remaining Rebirth use inside the selected Super Rebirth Goal, starting with the lowest earners.
Future-use droids are preserved when Lounge, Companion, and other safe storage are full, even if that means a Build slot remains occupied.
Added hover help and visible descriptions explaining the behavior and tradeoffs of every sell priority.
Saved the new priority across local profiles, Supabase profiles, exports, and imports.

todo.text: Add a no-further-use sell priority and explain every Build-slot optimisation mode.

notes.title: Public Patch Notes page
notes.summary: Replaced the public To Do List with a complete, expandable release history.
changes: Replaced To Do List in the main navigation and sidebar with Patch Notes.
Added a release-history page where each update can be selected to reveal its complete list of changes.
Updated the What's New popup to link directly to Patch Notes.

notes.title: Galactic expansion and Nova Shop overhaul
notes.summary: Expanded Droid Archives with complete Galactic imagery, Rebirths 28-30, refreshed droid data, and a rebuilt Nova Shop reference.
changes: Added Galactic portraits for every non-Iconic droid, along with the missing Beskar portraits, all Mythic variant portraits, and the complete Mono-Walker portrait set.
Added Galactic production data and crafting times to droid records and individual wiki pages.
Added Rebirths 28-30 to all four Super Rebirth cycles, including their droid requirements, credit costs, Nova Crystal rewards, and multipliers.
Added Beskar to Galactic Upgrade Chip costs for Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary, and Mythic droids.
Rebuilt the Nova Shop with proper upgrade icons, current level costs and rewards, prerequisites, unlimited-level formulas, and Iconic Droid Nova Crystal prices.
Added a responsive Nova Shop layout with category navigation, upgrade selection, progress controls, and detailed level tables.
Closed Galactic Reports after receiving every value needed and added a thank-you message for contributors.
Fixed malformed quantity and requirement text in the Base roster and droid pickers.

todo.id: Complete Galactic and Nova data refresh
todo.text: Add Galactic images and data, Rebirths 28-30, upgrade costs, and the rebuilt Nova Shop.

notes.title: Responsive layout improvements
notes.summary: Improved layout consistency across desktop and mobile views.
changes: Kept the Droidex search field at a consistent width when switching quality tiers.
Fixed the compact spawn timers widening and clipping pages on mobile screens.
Improved mobile layouts for filters, action bars, cards, tables, modals, and helper panels across the archive.
Kept desktop layouts as the primary presentation while adding targeted narrow-screen breakpoints.

todo.text: Review the full archive for desktop consistency and mobile usability.

notes.title: Persistent Droidex filters
notes.summary: Added persistent collection filters for finding missing and non-flawless droids.
changes: Changed Missing only into a toggle that remains active across Droidex tiers and page visits.
Added a Non-flawless only toggle for finding droids that can still be marked flawless.
Both filters can be enabled together and their choices are remembered on the device.

todo.text: Add persistent Missing only and Non-flawless only toggles to Droidex.

notes.title: Collapsible Base panels
notes.summary: Added collapse controls for the larger Base helper panels.
changes: Made the Scrap calculator hideable on Base.
Made the Base Rebirth outlook collapsible.
Collapsed panel choices are remembered on the device.

todo.text: Add collapse controls for the Scrap calculator and Rebirth outlook panels.

notes.title: Galactic report modal
notes.summary: Updated Galactic Reports so players can submit several values at once with proof links.
changes: Changed Galactic Reports from an inline form to a popup with a searchable droid picker.
Added multi-droid submissions so one report can include several Buy Cost or Earn Amount values.
Added optional screenshot proof links, limited to Gyazo or Discord image links.
Blocked Imgur proof links with a note that Imgur is blocked in the UK.

todo.text: Make Galactic Reports use a popup picker with multiple rows and screenshot proof links.

notes.title: Galactic Reports
notes.summary: Added a community report page for Galactic droid costs and earn amounts.
changes: Added a Galactic Reports tab where players can submit Buy Cost or Earn Amount values for non-Iconic droids.
Inputs accept full numbers and shorthand values, such as 12400 or 12.4k.
Signed-in players only see their own submissions, while the admin can view, edit, and delete all reports.
Added moderator support so trusted users can view the full report list without edit controls.

todo.text: Add Galactic droid cost and income reporting with admin and moderator views.

notes.title: Galactic variants and Nova Featured
notes.summary: Added Galactic quality support, updated spawn timers, and added the new Nova Shop Featured upgrades.
changes: Added Galactic as a new quality above Beskar for all non-Iconic droids.
Galactic droid costs and income are shown as Coming Soon until the values are confirmed.
Rebirth checks now treat Galactic as valid for Beskar and lower quality requirements.
Added a Nova Shop Featured tab with Critical Chance, Critical Amount, and Companion Slot.
Critical Chance and Critical Amount are tracked as uncapped upgrades with known first costs of 60 and 30 Nova Crystals.
Replaced the Rainbow spawn timer with a Galactic Coming Soon timer and updated Beskar to every 15 minutes.
Iconic droids now add to Base as Default without asking for a variant.

todo.text: Add Galactic variant support, Nova Featured upgrades, timer updates, and Iconic default-only adding.

notes.title: Rebirth and credit display polish
notes.summary: Improved Rebirth planning displays and fixed a random scroll jump.
changes: Added a Rebirth page toggle for showing or hiding completed rebirths.
Base Rebirth Outlook now shows the next rebirth, its credit cost, and the droids required.
Needed later in this cycle now shows credit costs beside each rebirth heading.
Credit amounts now use the local Credits icon.
Rarity badges on Droids and Droidex pages now use their proper rarity colours.
Fixed the page randomly jumping back to the top during same-page updates.

todo.text: Add completed rebirth toggle, credit icons, next rebirth outlook, and fix page jump.

notes.title: Rebirth goal planning
notes.summary: Added a Super Rebirth Goal setting and a full Rebirth guide page.
changes: Added Super Rebirth Goal so Base, Optimise, and recommendations stop caring about rebirths past your chosen target.
Added a Rebirth page showing every rebirth requirement in the selected cycle, even past your current goal.
Added a Base outlook box that highlights ready rebirths and the rarities/variants still worth watching for.
Renamed BU-4D to B-U4D and added coloured rarity labels across the archive.

todo.text: Add Super Rebirth Goal, Rebirth page, and rarity colours.

notes.title: Lucky Droid rarity chances
notes.summary: Lucky Droid recommendations now include Mythics and score upgrades by their rarity-based success chance.
changes: Added Mythic droids to Lucky Droid recommendations.
Lucky upgrade odds are now Common 32%, Rare 16%, Epic 8%, Legendary 4%, and Mythic 2%.
Rebirth and Credit recommendations now rank by expected value instead of using one flat chance.

todo.text: Factor rarity-based Lucky Droid upgrade chances into recommendations.

notes.title: C-3PO joins Droid Archives
notes.summary: C-3PO has been added as a new iconic Worker droid.
changes: Added C-3PO as an iconic Worker droid.
C-3PO provides 25%/s income while placed in a productive station.
Added his Companion passive: 2x Droid Sell Value.
Added support for update popups and patch notes.

todo.text: Add C-3PO iconic droid and patch notes.

notes.title: Lucky Droid recommendations
notes.summary: Added a Lucky Droid Recommendation page for choosing the best daily 4% upgrade gamble.
changes: Added a Lucky Droid tab to the top navigation and sidebar.
Added Rebirth based recommendations that prioritise future rebirth progress and upgrade-chip savings.
Added Credit based recommendations that prioritise the biggest credits-per-hour gain.
Each recommendation can be clicked for a breakdown of why it was chosen.
